title: Spicy Stir Fry Macaroni
description: A quick and spicy macaroni stir fry with crunchy vegetables. This dish is easy to make and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the macaroni according to the package instructions until al dente.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until they start to soften.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the stir-fry sauce and fermented soybean paste (if using). Stir well to combine.
Add the cooked macaroni to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the macaroni is well coated with the sauce.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the macaroni to a serving dish and top with crunchy fried shallots (if using).
